remarks: UTILITIES INCLUDED! Enjoy in-town New Canaan living in this sunny and charming 1-bedroom, 1-bath townhouse-style apartment featuring a private entrance, private yard, and off-street parking. Tucked away on a quiet street, yet just moments from everything New Canaan has to offer, this special East Maple Street location provides the perfect blend of privacy and convenience. Imagine strolling into town for ice cream on a beautiful evening or enjoying easy access to New Canaan's award-winning restaurants, the new world-class library, boutique shopping, parks, and Metro-North train service to NYC. Additional features include central air conditioning, oil heat (included), and a bright, sunny interior. Available immediately. No smoking and no pets. References and full credit report required.
